name: agentic-coding-fitness

owner.name: Agentic Coding Fitness @ Rust Tech Bar

description: Learn-by-doing skills for building production agentic AI: the fundamentals (LLM APIs, tool use, agent loops, MCP, RAG, multi-agent systems, knowledge-graph memory, production GraphRAG with evaluation) plus the 12-pattern taxonomy, production & observability, agent evaluation/CI gating, a drill library, the 16-week curriculum, vibe-coding & security, A2A, and skill-authoring.

plugins.name: agentic-coding-fitness
plugins.description: 16 concept-and-practice skills that teach, demo, and run guided labs for everything in the course and the strategy blueprint: talking to LLMs, tool use, the agent loop, MCP & skills, RAG, multi-agent patterns, agent memory with Neo4j, production GraphRAG with RAGAS evaluation, choosing models/patterns (12-pattern taxonomy), production & observability (HITL, LangSmith, cost), agent evaluation with CI gates, a drill library, the 16-week curriculum, vibe-coding & security, the A2A protocol, and authoring your own skills.
